title: Comprehensive analysis of epigenomics and transcriptome data to identify potential target genes associated with obesity.
author: Wu P Guo L Li X Du Y Lin X Ma X Lin Y Wen C Yang C Liu N Feng Q Xue Y Guan M
content: S-EPMC9614047 PMC9614047 Comprehensive analysis of epigenomics and transcriptome data to identify potential target genes associated with obesity. DNA methylation is closely related to the occurrence and development of many diseases, but its role in obesity is still unclear. This study aimed to find
